sections.description: Build and map file-based HTML email templates for Bricks Builder forms.
sections.changelog:
1.0.4

  • Changed template storage to the site's uploads folder for all installs so templates are not removed by theme updates.
  • Kept legacy theme-based template files readable and copy them to uploads when the builder opens.

1.0.3

  • Prevented duplicate HTML document wrappers when Bricks forms use HTML email format.

1.0.2

  • Fixed the release version metadata so WordPress installs the update as version 1.0.2.
  • Updated the updater package URL to the 1.0.2 GitHub tag archive.

1.0.1

  • Added multisite-safe template storage in per-site uploads folders.
  • Updated admin notices and documentation for multisite template storage.

1.0.0

  • Initial release.
  • Added file-based HTML template editor for Bricks forms.
  • Added template assignment for Bricks admin email and confirmation email.
  • Added checkbox-based target selection for Email and Confirmation email.
  • Added support for saving templates without assigning them to any email.
  • Added placeholder replacement for submitted Bricks form fields, including normalized Bricks field IDs.
  • Added preview rendering in the template editor.
  • Added automatic updates via bundled Plugin Update Checker.
  • Added cleanup for stale mappings when a mapped template file no longer exists.
  • Improved release package exclusions for local templates, todo files, ZIPs, and git metadata.
